      "body": {

        "required": true,

        "optionalPositiveInteger": true

        "type": "string",

      },

        "type": "string",
        "enum": [
          "LEFT",
          "RIGHT"
        ]
      },

2026-04-15T19:12:50.6851603Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-15T19:12:50.6852142Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:50.6852580Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:50.6852980Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:50.6853300Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:50.6853539Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:50.6853710Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:50.6854069Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:50.6854689Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:50.6854945Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:50.6855170Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:50.6855480Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:50.6855750Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:50.6855962Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:50.6856313Z [36;1mecho "Safe Outputs MCP server will run on port ${PORT}"[0m

2026-04-15T19:12:50.6882594Z   GH_AW_MODEL_MULTIPLIERS: {
  "version": "1",
  "description": "Effective Tokens (ET) computation data per the gh-aw Effective Tokens Specification v0.2.0. Token class weights are applied first to normalize across token classes, then the per-model multiplier scales the result relative to the reference model.",
  "reference_model": "claude-sonnet-4.5",
  "token_class_weights": {
    "input": 1.0,
    "cached_input": 0.1,
    "output": 4.0,
    "reasoning": 4.0,
    "cache_write": 1.0
  },
  "multipliers": {
